name: Title: French Onion Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle grated Gruyere and Parmesan cheeses onto bread slices.
2. Pass under the broiler until toasted and cheese melts. Remove from oven and set aside.
3. Heat butter and oil in a stockpot over medium-low flame.
4. Add onions, heat, and stir for 30-40 minutes until dark golden (not brown).
5. Stir in flour, heat, and stir for 2 minutes to color further.
6. Slowly stir in 1 cup of broth to blend with flour.
7. Add remaining broth, water, and wine; mix well.
8. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 30 minutes.
9. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
10. Place toasted bread into individual bowls.
11. Ladle soup over bread.
12. Serve immediately.
